titleStmt.title: SII 28.135: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 135. (A.R. No. 290 of 1913.)

summary.p: CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north Wall.
This record opens with a statement that it is a copy of the inscription in tiruv-edir-ambalam (hall in front).

Records that for the decoration of God Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār, to secure the supply of cheṅgaḻunīr flowers, Chekkiḻāṉ Araśaṉ Irājaṉ alias Kachchiyarāṉ of Aḷanākavūr in Kaḷattūr-kkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷamaṇḍalam, endowed 30 kāśu and that out of this amount, 1(1/4) vēli (calculated at 100 kuḻi per mā (i.e.) 2000 kuḻi per vēli) of land called tāmarai-ōḍai on Nāgaṉ-pāḍi, was purchased for 10 kāsu in the name of Piḷḷaiyār Chaṇḍeśvaradēvar from the sabhā of Māṟpaḍugai alias Aḻagiyachōḻachcharuppēdimaṅgalam in Tiruvindaḷūr-nāḍu in Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu and the balance of 20 kāśu was paid to the sabhā for freeing that land from taxes (iṟai).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § tiruvetirampalattuk kalveṭṭuppaṭi § svastiśrī § tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpatteḻāvatu Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamu
ṭaiyārkkuc ceṅkaḻunirt tiruppaḷḷitāmam cātti Aruḷukaikku jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrk koṭṭattu Aḷanākavūrc cekkiḻāṉ Aracaṉ Irācaṉāṉa kacciyarāyaṉ piḷḷai
yār caṇḍeśvaratevar tirunāmattāl taṉkāciṭṭu rājādhirājavaḷanāṭṭuttiruvintaḷūr nāṭṭu māṟpaṭukai yāṉa Aḻakiyacoḻaccaruppeti
maṅkalattu sabhaiyār pakkal nākaṉpāṭiyil tāmarai Oṭaiyeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa Oṭai nūṟukuḻi koṇṭatu Orumāvākak kuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattai
ññūṟṟiṉāl nilam Oṉṟekāl Iṉṉilattukku Ellai śrīkāverikkulai teṉ Ellaiyākavum śrīpattappiriyattāḻvār nilam melellaiyākavum vaṭataḷi matucūtaṉumi
rāyūr cevaṭiciraṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār nilam vaṭavellaiyākavum Aṭṭāmpuṟattu śrībhūṣmaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār nilamum maṇ koḷvāy nilamum kiḻakkellaiyākavum Ivvellaikkuḷpaṭṭa
Oṭaiyuṅkaraiyum rūpāy kakhakku vilaiyāka Iṭṭa kācu 10m Iṉṉilam Iṟaiiḻiccukaikku piramāṇam paṇṇit tanta sabhāniyogattukku Ivvūr sabhaiyār pakkal Oṭukkiṉa kā
cu 2 10m Ākak kācu 3 10 Ikkācu muppatuṅ koṇṭu sabhaiyār paṇikka vilai Olaippiramāṇamum Iṟaiyili ceyta sabhāniyogamum Eḻutiṉa Ivvūrk kaṇakkaṉ
kaṭikai maddhyasthan Ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉ puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭāṉ perāyiramuṭaiyāṉāṉa paṇḍitappiriyaṉeḻuttāl pramāṇaṅkaḷum viṟṟa sabhaiyāril meleḻuttiṭṭa vaṅkippu
ṟattu sarvvakumārabhaṭṭaṉum gomaḍattu śrīkṛṣṇabhaṭṭaṉum taccūr trivikramaṉ Umāsahitabhaṭṭaṉum muppirāṉ keśavabhaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa sabhaiyār meleḻuttāka vilaikoṇṭu Iṟaiyi
ḻicciṉa piramāṇappaṭi cantirātittavaṟ cellak kaṭavatāka Ippiramāṇaṅkaḷ tirukkai Oṭṭiyil Oṭukku §
Digital edition of SII 28.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
